title.en: Is it time to give record-breaker Pickford the credit he deserves?
title.zh-CN: 是时候给破纪录的皮克福德应得的荣誉了吗？

summary.en: Is it time to finally give England keeper Jordan Pickford the credit he deserves as he enters the World Cup history books, asks chief football writer Phil McNulty.
summary.zh-CN: 首席足球作家菲尔·麦克纳尔蒂（ Phil McNulty ）问道，是时候最终给予英格兰门将乔丹·皮克福德（ Jordan Pickford ）应有的荣誉，因为他进入了世界杯历史书籍。

title.en: England set for open-air Miami heat - but do Norway hold the edge?
title.zh-CN: 英格兰为迈阿密的露天热火做好准备-但挪威是否占据优势？

summary.en: England will head into unknown territory at this World Cup when they face Norway in Miami - playing in searing temperatures.
summary.zh-CN: 当英格兰队在迈阿密面对挪威队时，他们将在本届世界杯上进入未知的领域-在灼热的气温下比赛。

title.en: Should Argentina take Messi off penalties?
title.zh-CN: 阿根廷是否应该取消对梅西的处罚？

summary.en: Lionel Messi keeps rewriting World Cup history, but after his latest miss from the spot, should Argentina hand penalty duties to someone else?
summary.zh-CN: 莱昂内尔·梅西（ Lionel Messi ）一直在重写世界杯的历史，但在他最近一次失误之后，阿根廷是否应该将罚款责任交给其他人？

title.en: Playing golf with Trump surreal - Kane
title.zh-CN: 与特朗普超现实主义者一起打高尔夫球-凯恩

summary.en: England captain Harry Kane says he once played golf with United States President Donald Trump, describing the experience as "surreal".

title.en: When the World Cup finishes, the football continues on BBC Sport
title.zh-CN: 世界杯结束后，英国广播公司体育频道继续播放足球赛事

summary.en: When the World Cup ends we'll still have loads of great content every day as we build up to the new football season.
summary.zh-CN: 当世界杯结束时，随着我们为新的足球赛季做准备，我们每天仍然会有大量精彩的内容。

title.en: Wales defender Lockyer signs for Melbourne Victory
title.zh-CN: 威尔士后卫洛克耶为墨尔本胜利签约

summary.en: Wales defender Tom Lockyer agrees a deal to join Australian A-League side Melbourne Victory.
